title: LCL Inverter Active Damping Tuning Rules

sections.heading: Loop ordering
sections.text: Establish damping or resonance attenuation before pushing current-loop crossover. Without that ordering, a faster dq controller can excite the LCL pole pair instead of improving tracking.

sections.heading: Sampling note
sections.text: Keep sensing and PWM delay in mind because digital delay reduces the practical damping margin of LCL-filtered current control.
